description:
SSOT for agent roles. Each role declares allowed_paths (glob patterns) and forbidden_paths (glob patterns). agentguard verify reads the PR's changed-file list and the declared role, then rejects diffs that touch forbidden paths or contain only-not-allowed paths.

A role's effective rule is: every changed file must match at least one allowed_paths glob, AND must not match any forbidden_paths glob. forbidden_paths win on conflict.

IMPORTANT — path convention: globs are REPO-RELATIVE, not monorepo-relative. The dumb-agent-safety workflow runs inside the contracts repo and feeds agentguard the output of `git diff --name-only` (paths like `fixtures/positive/x.json`, not `contracts/fixtures/positive/x.json`). Decision 004 fixed an earlier monorepo-style miswrite that prevented every dumb-agent PR from passing. If a future role needs to gate paths in backend or frontend, add a separate workflow in that repo.

See contracts/AGENT_CONTRACT.md for the human-readable mirror.

roles.label: Designer / human-driven implementer
roles.description: The primary author class. Can touch any file in any repo. Subject to manual review and other CI gates, not to the path allowlist.

roles.label: Contract Fuzzer Agent / IR Mutation Scout
roles.description: Low-context closed-loop probe. Generates small candidates and lets verifiers decide. Never makes semantic decisions, never modifies accepted contracts, schemas, decisions, verifier code, or CI workflows. Allowed task types: positive fixture, negative fixture, fuzz corpus expansion, manifest normalization, failure minimization (output as a guard-candidate note since reports/min/ is no longer in scope).

pr_isolation.rationale: Forbidding the dumb agent from touching verifier code in the same PR prevents it from weakening tests to make its candidates pass.

merge_authority.rationale: Bounded merge authority over candidate/evidence space only. agentguard merge-check enforces: every file in auto_merge_paths, none in forbidden_paths, file count <= max_files_per_pr. ir/candidates/ is intentionally writable but NOT auto-mergeable — designer reviews IR candidates.

roles.label: Verifier / schema / test author
roles.description: Modifies verifier logic, schemas, or tests. May NOT touch candidate-space in the same PR. Subject to manual review of the verifier change.
